core.label: Modula-2 Fundamentals
core.description: Wirth's successor to Pascal with modules and coroutines.

topics.label: Setup (GNU Modula-2)
topics.description: Install gm2 (part of GCC). Modula-2 introduced modules for separate compilation.

topics.label: Modules (DEFINITION/IMPLEMENTATION)
topics.description: Separate interface (.def) and implementation (.mod). The key innovation over Pascal.

topics.label: Types & Variables
topics.description: INTEGER, REAL, CHAR, BOOLEAN, CARDINAL, ARRAY, RECORD, SET, POINTER.

topics.label: Procedures
topics.description: PROCEDURE with VAR parameters. Nested procedures with access to enclosing scope.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: IF/ELSIF/ELSE/END, CASE, FOR, WHILE, REPEAT/UNTIL, LOOP/EXIT.

topics.label: Coroutines
topics.description: COROUTINE, TRANSFER, IOTRANSFER. Built-in cooperative multitasking.
